summary: Excellent front‑of‑house Schoeps capture delivers a realistic, high‑fidelity Grateful Dead concert sound.
review: The sole review praises the FOH Schoeps mic setup from the Oade’s as the most realistic and immersive way to hear a Dead show, indicating an excellent, crisp recording. No musical performance details were provided, so the show quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one high‑rating review focuses on outstanding recording quality; with no information on the musical performance, the overall rating leans heavily on the audio fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house Schoeps microphones deliver a clear, realistic and immersive soundstage; reviewers describe it as the most authentic GD concert experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details mentioned in the review.
